title: EloTiers
description: This TierTagger mod allows you to display MCPvP, FlowPvP, PvPTiers, MCTiers, and SubTiers in the Tablist and let you create PvP Clans.
body:
## 🌟 What is EloTiers?
EloTiers is a complete competitive **Minecraft PvP leaderboard** ecosystem. It tracks real-time player ratings, hosts detailed leaderboards, and lets you compare stats side-by-side on the website or via our interactive Discord Bot. 
This client mod links your Minecraft game directly to the EloTiers network, giving you instant stats, and matchmaking features right inside your client. It serves as the ultimate **Minecraft tiertagger** and rank viewer.
---
## ⚔️ Key Features
### 📊 In-Game Tiertagger (Tiers & Elo Stats)
Never get surprised by a pro player again. See the exact rating and tier of everyone around you:
*   **Nametag Tiertagger:** Displays active tiers and Elo rating numbers floating directly above players' heads.
*   **Tablist Tiertagger:** Checks the player list (Tab) to show ratings and rankings next to usernames.
*   **Multi Integration:** Pulls data from major PvP directories and leaderboards, including:
    *   **mctiers.com** / **mctiers**
    *   **FlowPvP** / **FlowPvP.GG**
    *   **mcpvp** / **mcpvp.com**
    *   **pvptiers** / PvP Tiers
    *   **SubTiers**
    *   The official **EloTiers** leaderboard
### 🎒 Smart Kit Detection (Auto-Kit)
The mod is smart enough to know what you are playing. 
*   It looks at your inventory items in real-time and automatically switches the displayed rankings to match your current gamemode.
*   Supports all major kits for **mctiers**, **mcpvp**, and **FlowPvP.GG**: *UHC, Pot PvP, Netherite Pot, Crystal, Axe, Mace, Bow, SMP, Vanilla, and Sword*.
### 🛡️ Clan Tags & Glowing Player Outlines
Coordinate with your clan and spot threats instantly on any **Minecraft leaderboard** server:
*   **Clan Tags:** Shows clan names and tags next to player nametags.
*   **Glowing Outlines:** Highlights players with customized glow colors depending on whether they are your Clanmates, Allies, or Enemies.
*   **Custom Colors:** Personalize the colors of your team and enemies using simple color settings.
### 🎮 In-Game Matchmaking
Ready to fight? Join matchmaking queues directly from your game:
*   Find opponents for Ranked or Unranked matches without navigating website lobbies.
*   The mod automatically finds you a match and connects you straight to the duel server.
